name: spo-export-all-term-groups-with-translation-labels
title: Export all term groups with translation labels
shortDescription: Exports SharePoint Term Store groups, sets, terms, and multilingual labels to CSV, JSON, or both.
longDescription: Exports SharePoint Term Store groups, term sets, terms, and translation labels to CSV, JSON, or both formats with optional group filtering.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Export all term groups with translation labels

references.name: Want to learn more about PnP PowerShell and the cmdlets
references.description: Check out the PnP PowerShell site to get started and for the reference to the cmdlets.
